creator: dgeo@centrale-med.fr
text:
A little change added: WANT_PHP_CLI instead of WANT_PHP_WEB...
Now, in this patch:

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-drush
- Update to 4.4
- Take maintainership (already approved by freebsduser@paradisegreen.co.uk)
- Licence + pear-Console_Table dependency from ports/153251 (which can
be closed too)
- WANT_PHP_CLI

May some commiter have a look and commit ?

Thanks !
